$comment: BecomeChampion Rules Pack - Adeptus Custodes (10th Edition). Generated from 10e CSV data. Includes core Adeptus Custodes detachments, Adeptus Custodes datasheets, Sisters of Silence datasheets that share the faction, and Forge World Adeptus Custodes units surfaced from the current dataset; not official rules text.
author: Community
source_note: Generated from current 10e CSV exports. This pack includes Adeptus Custodes detachments Shield Host, Talons Of The Emperor, Null Maiden Vigil, Auric Champions, Solar Spearhead, Lions of the Emperor. Units include Adeptus Custodes faction datasheets from the main faction pack and Adeptus Custodes (Forge World), including Sisters of Silence datasheets that are part of the faction dataset. Boarding Actions detachments are intentionally excluded. Rules text is extracted and normalized for in-app prompting; check official publications for authoritative wording.

abilities.name: Turbo-boost
abilities.timing: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move chara
abilities.summary: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Implacable Vanguard
abilities.timing: in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"
abilities.summary: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Tactical Perception
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Tenacious Spirit
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Daughter of the Abyss
abilities.timing: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
abilities.summary: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Vexilla
abilities.timing: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.
abilities.summary: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

abilities.timing: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER , MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the W
abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER , MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: From Golden Light
abilities.timing: at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves
abilities.summary: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Daughters of the Abyss
abilities.timing: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
abilities.summary: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Self Repair
abilities.timing: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound
abilities.summary: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.timing: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.
abilities.summary: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.name: Heavy Assault Infantry
abilities.timing: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1
abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: From Golden Light
abilities.timing: at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves
abilities.summary: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Infernus Firebombs
abilities.timing: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of
abilities.summary: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Swift Onslaught
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit

abilities.name: Martial Inspiration
abilities.timing: in your Charge phase, this model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn which it Advanced
abilities.summary: Once per battle, in your Charge phase, this model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Advanced Firepower
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MON
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Dread Foe
abilities.timing: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6,
abilities.summary: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Galatus Shield
abilities.timing: Each time a melee attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
abilities.summary: Each time a melee attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.summary: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.summary: If a unit disembarks from this TRANSPORT before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.timing: Once per battle, when this models unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. if it does until that fight is res
abilities.summary: Once per battle, when this models unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. if it does until that fight is resolved, both Ka’tah Stances are active for that unit, instead of only one.

abilities.name: Strategic Mastery
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, you can select one model from your army with this ability. That model’s unit can be targeted with
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, you can select one model from your army with this ability. That model’s unit can be targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.summary: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abilities.summary: If this model is equipped with 2 Telemon caestus weapons in addition to its armoured feet weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those Telemon caestus weapons.

abilities.name: Captain-General
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill or Weapon skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill or Weapon skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll

abilities.name: Moment Shackle
abilities.timing: Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase: - This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12
abilities.summary:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase:
- This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
- This model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Golden Laurels
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Hero of Lion’s Gate
abilities.timing: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that r
abilities.summary: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Tarsis Buckler
abilities.timing: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.
abilities.summary: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

abilities.name: Strike from the Skies
abilities.timing: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
abilities.summary: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Swooping Dive
abilities.timing: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have alrea
abilities.summary: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Unyielding Ancient
abilities.timing: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the en
abilities.summary: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

abilities.summary: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.summary: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.summary: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.timing: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal Move or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER an
abilities.summary: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal Move or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

abilities.summary: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sanctified Flames
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: SHOULDER THE MANTLE
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that is not leading a unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

stratagems.name: SLAYER OF CHAMPIONS
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected at the start of your Command phase as the target of your Assemblage of Might ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army makes an attack that target that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll In addition, if the destroyed unit was a CHARACTER unit, gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: SUPERHUMAN RESERVES
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Warlord model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement that says it can only be used Once per battle.
stratagems.target: That Adeptus Custodes Warlord model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use its Once per battle’ ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).

stratagems.name: THE EMPEROR’S AUSPICE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CHARACTER models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: EARNING OF A NAME
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes Character units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CHARACTER model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: VIGIL UNENDING
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: PEERLESS WARRIOR
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: UNLEASH THE LIONS
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Allarus Custodians or Aquilon Custodians unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: DEFIANT TO THE LAST
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the CHARACTER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: GILDED CHAMPION
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet that states it can only be used ‘once per battle’.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use that ‘once per battle’ ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase).
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: SWIFT AS THE EAGLE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: MANOEUVRE AND FIRE
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
tags: Lions of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: PURGATION SWEEP
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Witchseekers unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit. If such a weapon targets a PSYKER or Battle-shocked unit this phase, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic instead.
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: ANATHEMA BLADEMASTERY
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Vigilators unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll If the target of that attack is Battle-shocked or a PSYKER , you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: WITCH HUNTERS
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Anathema Psykana unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability, but models in your unit can only target PSYKER units with their attacks.
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: PSY-CHAFF VOLLEY
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Prosecutors unit from your army that has just shot.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while your unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is prosecuted. While a unit is prosecuted, each time an Anathema Psykana model makes an attack against that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. While a PSYKER or Battle-shocked unit is prosecuted, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: PSYCHIC ABOMINATIONS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Anathema Psykana Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and Battle-shocked and PSYKER models can only select your unit as a target of a ranged attack if they are within 12".
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: DESPERATION’S PRICE
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy PSYKER unit has either finished using a Psychic ability that targets a unit, or finished making Psychic Attacks.
stratagems.target: One Anathema Psykana unit from your army within 18" of that enemy PSYKER unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy PSYKER unit must take a Leadership test If the test is passed, that PSYKER unit is Battle-shocked; if the test is failed that PSYKER unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked.
tags: Null Maiden Vigil – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: ARCHEOTECH MUNITIONS
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: ARCANE GENETIC ALCHEMY
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a mortal wound has been allocated to an Adeptus Custodes model from your army(excluding Anathema Psykana models).
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES model’s unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: UNWAVERING SENTINELS
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Infantry unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that is within range of an objective marker you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: AVENGE THE FALLEN
stratagems.timing: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit. If your unit is Below Half-strength, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those melee weapons instead.

stratagems.name: MULTIPOTENTIALITY
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that Fell Back this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: VIGILANCE ETERNAL
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Battleline unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: FLAWLESS CONSTRUCTION
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: EMPEROR’S VENGEANCE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the Walker keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: WRATHFUL ADVANCE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Piles In.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: UNSTOPPABLE
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Custodes Vehicle or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: RELENTLESS PERSECUTION
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the Walker keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

stratagems.name: PUNISHMENT INESCAPABLE
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: TALONS INTERLOCKED
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY units from your army, and one enemy unit that is an eligible target for all of those units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of your units makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: TALONED PINCER
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your units can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: EMPEROR’S EXECUTIONERS
stratagems.timing: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: EMPYRIC SEVERANCE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CusTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit within 6" of that ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic attacks and mortal wounds.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: SHIELD OF HONOUR
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Anathema Psykana Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one other friendly Adeptus Custodes Infantry unit (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) within 6" of that ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, any attack that targets your ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit must instead target your other ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit (unless it is not an eligible target).
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Epic Deed Stratagem

stratagems.name: HUNT AS ONE
stratagems.timing: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your units are eilgible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor
tags: Talons Of The Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

detachment_rules.name: Martial Mastery
detachment_rules.summary:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the bullet points below. If you do, until the start of the next battle round, that bullet point’s effects apply.
- Each time an Adeptus Custodes model from your army with the Martial Ka’tah ability makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
- Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ADEPTUS CUSTODES models from your army with the Martial Ka’tah ability by 1.

detachment_rules.name: Revered Companions
detachment_rules.timing: Detachment Rule - Talons Of The Emperor
detachment_rules.summary:
Anathema Psykana units from your army gain the following the ability:
Null Aegis (Aura): While an Adeptus Custodes unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
All other ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army gain the following ability:
Deadly Unity (Aura): While an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor

detachment_rules.name: Creeping Dread (Aura)
detachment_rules.summary:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is either a PSYKER unit or below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more Anathema Psykana models from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that unit is Below Half-strength, it must subtract 1 from its Battle-shock test this phase instead.
Designer’s Note: This means that all enemy PSYKER units within range of this Aura ability and all enemy units within range of this Aura ability that have lost one or more models must take a Battle-shock test in your opponents Command phase, not just those that are Below Half-strength.

detachment_rules.name: Assemblage of Might
detachment_rules.summary: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in an Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

detachment_rules.name: Auric Armour
detachment_rules.summary:
- While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is at Starting Strength, unless that unit is an Aircraft or it is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
- While an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army is below Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
- While an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army is Below Half-strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
MORITOI ANCIENTS
The Adeptus Custodes’ honoured fallen are ever eager for battle.
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER units from your army and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for such units.
KEYWORDS
In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER models from your army. The selected units gain the CHARACTER keyword.
Designer’s Note: This means that the selected models can be given Enhancements and one of them can be selected as your WARLORD .

detachment_rules.name: Against All Odds
detachment_rules.timing: Detachment Rule - Lions of the Emperor
detachment_rules.summary: Each time a model in an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Vehicles) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor

enhancements.name: Adamantine Talisman
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Auric Mantle
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain or Blade Champion model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Enhanced Voidsheen Cloak
enhancements.summary:
Anathema Psykana model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made by a PSYKER or Battle-shocked model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Blade Imperator
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Once per battle, after the bearer s unit ends a Charge move, all enemy units within 6" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Aegis Projector
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Talons Of The Emperor
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS Custodes model only. Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Points: 20
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor

enhancements.name: Superior Creation
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Lions of the Emperor
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes Infantry model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Points: 25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor

enhancements.name: Augury Uplink
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Points: 35

enhancements.name: Huntress’ Eye
enhancements.summary:
Anathema Psykana model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Castellan’s Mark
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Praesidius
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Lions of the Emperor
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

Points: 25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor

enhancements.name: Champion of the Imperium
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Talons Of The Emperor
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The range of the bearer’s Null Aegis or Deadly Unity ability is increased to 9".

Points: 25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor

enhancements.name: Inspirational Exemplar
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 5+. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer; that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Martial Philosopher
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Points: 30

enhancements.name: From the Hall of Armouries
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Honoured Fallen (Aura)
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes Vehicle model only. While a friendly Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Fierce Conqueror
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Lions of the Emperor
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain model only. At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding down).

Points: 15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor

enhancements.name: Gift of Terran Artifice
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Talons Of The Emperor
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Points: 15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor

enhancements.name: Oblivion Knight
enhancements.summary:
Anathema Psykana model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targeted an enemy PSYKER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Kataphraktoi
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted model only. In your Command phase, select one Adeptus Custodes Vehicle or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Panoptispex
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain or Blade Champion model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES cover] ability.

Points: 5

enhancements.name: Raptor Blade
enhancements.summary:
Anathema Psykana model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearers melee weapons. While the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy PSYKER units that are Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Points: 5

enhancements.name: Veiled Blade
enhancements.summary:
Adeptus Custodes model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearers melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, triple the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic until the end of the turn.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Radiant Mantle
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Talons Of The Emperor
enhancements.summary:
ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Points: 30
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Talons Of The Emperor

enhancements.name: Admonimortis
enhancements.timing: Army Roster - Lions of the Emperor
enhancements.summary:
Shield-Captain model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

Points: 10
enhancements.source: Wahapedia CSV / Lions of the Emperor
